summary: M333 — Google Analytics wired. Hostname-based GA id resolver in src/main.js: emberveil.radgh.com -> G-5H26ZXKBCL, anything else (radgh.github.io/RSG-Demos, localhost) -> G-XP7B7KVNY8. Override path remains: window.__RSG_GA_ID or VITE_GA_ID. Demos hub generate_pages_index.js now ships its own inline consent banner + GA snippet using the same rsg_consent_v1 localStorage key; GA only loads after Accept; same-origin so the decision shares with the game13 tab. Both properties get their own GA stream.
